title: BCV Venezuela — Consumer Price Index (INPC national since 2008, and IPC Caracas metro area since 1950)
time_coverage: 4_5_7: national INPC since 2008; 4_1_7: Caracas metro area IPC since 1950 (pre-INPC historical continuity series)
notes: Direct download worked on first attempt, no flakiness/Wayback fallback needed this session (bookkeeping.md warns this source is 'often flaky' — not observed today). Page also links category-breakdown files (4_5_1 variations, 4_5_3 indices by group, 4_5_7_2) not downloaded here; these two files (flagship national INPC since 2008 + the older long-run Caracas series back to 1950 for historical continuity) were judged sufficient.
